hero.title:
Professional Beauty,
Delivered to You
hero.subtitle: Salon-grade skincare, haircare, and beauty devices curated by Sunray Studio professionals.

home.categoriesSubtitle: Find exactly what your beauty routine needs
home.brandStoryText: Born from years of professional salon experience, Sunray Studio brings you carefully curated beauty products that we trust and use every day. Each product is selected for its quality, effectiveness, and value.
home.brandStoryText2: From premium Korean skincare to professional beauty devices, we bridge the gap between salon treatments and your daily beauty routine.

footer.description: Professional beauty products curated by Sunray Studio. Salon-grade quality for your daily beauty routine.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.emptyCartDesc: Add some products before checking out.
checkout.orderPlacedDesc: Thank you for your order. We'll contact you shortly to confirm delivery details.

about.title: About Sunray Studio
about.heroText: Where professional beauty meets everyday care
about.story: Founded by beauty professionals with years of salon experience, Sunray Studio is more than a store — it's a bridge between professional treatments and your daily routine.
about.missionText: To make salon-quality beauty accessible to everyone in Mongolia. We personally test, select, and recommend every product in our collection.
about.qualityText: Every product is salon-tested before it reaches our shelves.
about.authenticText: Direct partnerships with brands ensure genuine products.
about.expertText: Our salon professionals help you find the right products.
